suggestions: In mcpkit perpetual orchestrator: add a notesWritten bool flag, set it true when HandleNotes succeeds, skip fallback 'Completed cycle N' note if flag is true
Consider deduplicating existing improvement_log.json entries by removing hollow notes where what_worked only contains 'Completed cycle N'
For cross-repo tasks, immediately note the constraint and focus on documenting the required change rather than searching claudekit code

what_worked: Identified that t8-dedup-notes requires changes in mcpkit/rdcycle (sibling repo) orchestrator, not claudekit
